items.title: BTS tops Hot 100 again on fan support — longevity in question
items.snippet: BTS has topped the Billboard Hot 100 in the US with "Swim," the main track from its fifth full-length album "Arirang," marking the group’s seventh No. 1 on the chart. The latest ac...
items.description: BTS has topped the Billboard Hot 100 in the US with "Swim," the main track from its fifth full-length album "Arirang," marking the group’s seventh No. 1 on the chart. The latest achievement comes after the album also landed atop the Billboard 200, reinforcing BTS’ dominance across both major US charts. items.title: BTS' ‘Swim’ tops Billboard Hot 100, marking seventh No. 1 hit
items.snippet: BTS has once again topped the US Billboard charts, with its latest track “Swim” debuting at No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100 chart, marking the group’s seventh chart-topping hit. Acc...
items.description: BTS has once again topped the US Billboard charts, with its latest track “Swim” debuting at No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100 chart, marking the group’s seventh chart-topping hit. According to Billboard’s chart preview, the lead track from BTS’ fifth LP “Arirang” entered the Hot 100 dated April 4 at No. 1, outpacing Ella Langley’s “Choosin’ Texas” and Olivia Dean’s “Man I Need." BTS’ latest triumph adds “Swim” to its other list of songs that topped the Billboard Hot 100 chart, following “Dynamite,”

items.title: BTS says Billboard No. 1 'great honor,' hopes music offered 'courage and comfort'
items.snippet: K-pop supergroup BTS said Tuesday it was deeply honored to top the U.S. Billboard charts with its new album, "Arirang," adding it hoped the album and its lead track, "Swim," provid...
items.description: K-pop supergroup BTS said Tuesday it was deeply honored to top the U.S. Billboard charts with its new album, "Arirang," adding it hoped the album and its lead track, "Swim," provided listeners around the world with "courage and comfort." Billboard said in a preview of this week's Hot 100 main singles chart that "Swim" became the band's seventh No. 1 song on the chart, following the album's debut at No. 1 on the Billboard 200 chart. The dual triumph marks BTS' first simultaneous No. 1s on both ch

items.title: BTS earns 7th No. 1 song on the Billboard singles chart with 'Swim'
items.snippet: K-pop supergroup BTS has secured its seventh No. 1 hit on the US Billboard's main singles chart, debuting atop the chart with its latest single, "Swim." The upbeat alternative pop...
items.description: K-pop supergroup BTS has secured its seventh No. 1 hit on the US Billboard's main singles chart, debuting atop the chart with its latest single, "Swim." The upbeat alternative pop track, which leads the band's fifth studio album, "Arirang," topped the Billboard Hot 100 for the week of April 4. It outpaced Ella Langley's "Choosin' Texas" to claim the highest ranking, according to a Billboard preview released Monday (US time). items.title: Wonpil explores new sound, creative direction in ‘Unpiltered’
items.snippet: Day6’s Wonpil’s new solo EP, “Unpiltered,” marks a clear shift in his musical direction, as he experiments with sounds he had long wanted to try. His first solo EP, “Unpiltered” se...
items.description: Day6’s Wonpil’s new solo EP, “Unpiltered,” marks a clear shift in his musical direction, as he experiments with sounds he had long wanted to try. His first solo EP, “Unpiltered” set to release at 6 p.m. Monday, marks his first solo release since 2022 LP “Pilmography.” While his previous work leaned more toward warmth and comfort, the new album reflects a broader and more experimental approach. items.title: Red Velvet’s Irene looks inward in 1st solo LP
items.snippet: Irene of Red Velvet wants everyone to be their own biggest fan and exclaims it through her first solo studio album, “Biggest Fan,” which released Monday. Irene not only looks back...
items.description: Irene of Red Velvet wants everyone to be their own biggest fan and exclaims it through her first solo studio album, “Biggest Fan,” which released Monday. Irene not only looks back at her life, but works up the courage to appreciate and accept herself, hoping listeners will offer warm words to themselves when they listen to her new music, she said via label SM Entertainment. items.title: BTOB’s Changsub to release solo single
items.snippet: Lee Changsub of BTOB will release a single on April 23, his agency Fantagio announced Sunday. The teaser trailer spelled out the song title in Korean in the singer's handwriting. “...
items.description: Lee Changsub of BTOB will release a single on April 23, his agency Fantagio announced Sunday. The teaser trailer spelled out the song title in Korean in the singer's handwriting. “Youth” will be the singer's first new music in six months, after his second solo EP “End And.” He promoted the mini album with a solo tour of the same name, visiting seven cities across Korea. The tour ended last month with three encore concerts in Seoul. Changsub also spent his birthday with fans, hosting a party-them

items.title: BTS’ Jin logs 1.2b Spotify streams with ‘Echo’
items.snippet: Jin of BTS reached 1.2 billion streams on Spotify with his second solo EP “Echo,” label Big Hit Music announced Monday. The EP debuted on Billboard 200 at No. 3 and, led by lead tr...
items.description: Jin of BTS reached 1.2 billion streams on Spotify with his second solo EP “Echo,” label Big Hit Music announced Monday. The EP debuted on Billboard 200 at No. 3 and, led by lead track “Don’t Say You Love Me,” generated 1 billion streams in about seven months to become the most-streamed K-pop solo single on the platform last year. The single debuted on Billboard’s Hot 100 at No. 13 and on the UK Official Singles Top 100 at No. 10. Meanwhile, BTS on Friday released “Keep Swimming,” a remix of the

items.title: Illit's ‘Magnetic’ music video garners 300m views
items.snippet: Illit's debut music video "Magnetic" has surpassed 300 million YouTube views as of Sunday, agency Belift Lab said Monday. The video was unveiled in March 2024 for the main track of...
items.description: Illit's debut music video "Magnetic" has surpassed 300 million YouTube views as of Sunday, agency Belift Lab said Monday. The video was unveiled in March 2024 for the main track of the group’s first EP “Super Real Me,” showing the goofy yet lovely sides of the five members. “Magnetic” entered Billboard’s Hot 100 at No. 91, becoming the first debut single from a K-pop group to enter the main songs chart. items.title: Wonpil at his most ‘Unpiltered’ yet in new album
items.snippet: After four years, Day6’s Wonpil returns with a fresh solo sound, ready to lay his emotions bare. Wonpil's EP “Unpiltered,” released Monday, is his first solo release since his 2022...
items.description: After four years, Day6’s Wonpil returns with a fresh solo sound, ready to lay his emotions bare. Wonpil's EP “Unpiltered,” released Monday, is his first solo release since his 2022 album “Pilmography.” The seven-track mini album, written and composed by Wonpil, reflects his desire to present a side of himself that feels “newer, more vulnerable and less polished.” “This album will probably feel very different from my first solo album,” said Wonpil during a round interview at a cafe in southern Se

items.title: BTS' 'Arirang' debuts at No. 1 on Billboard 200
items.snippet: K-pop giant BTS has claimed its seventh No. 1 debut on the US Billboard's main albums chart with its new album, "Arirang." "Arirang," the band's first group project in three years...
items.description: K-pop giant BTS has claimed its seventh No. 1 debut on the US Billboard's main albums chart with its new album, "Arirang." "Arirang," the band's first group project in three years and nine months, debuted atop the Billboard 200 for the week of April 4, Billboard said in a chart preview released Sunday (US time). items.title: SM eyes US as Hybe doubles down on Asia
items.snippet: Two of K-pop’s two biggest players are recalibrating global strategies, with India emerging as a new frontier. SM Entertainment and Hybe are increasingly stepping into each other’s...
items.description: Two of K-pop’s two biggest players are recalibrating global strategies, with India emerging as a new frontier. SM Entertainment and Hybe are increasingly stepping into each other’s core markets, as SM pushes deeper into the US while Hybe accelerates its expansion across Asia, particularly India. SM has long maintained a strong foothold in Asia, especially in Japan, the world’s second-largest music market. Its early K-pop acts such as BoA, TVXQ and Shinee built massive followings there, with some

items.title: BTS to hold world tour shows in 5 Latin American countries in Oct.
items.snippet: K-pop superstar BTS will perform in five countries in Latin America in October, including Colombia and Peru, as part of its "Arirang" world tour, the group's agency said Saturday....
items.description: K-pop superstar BTS will perform in five countries in Latin America in October, including Colombia and Peru, as part of its "Arirang" world tour, the group's agency said Saturday. The septet will stage a total of 11 performances in five major cities in Latin America, starting in Bogota, Colombia, on Oct. 2-3, according to BigHit Music. The group will perform in Lima, Peru, on Oct. 9-10, followed by concerts in Santiago, Chile, on Oct. 16-17, and in Buenos Aires, Argentina, on Oct. 23-24. The fin

items.title: BTS' 'Arirang' shatters own records with 4.17 million first-week sales
items.snippet: BTS set a new industry benchmark with the group's latest album, "Arirang," selling approximately 4.17 million copies in its first week, according to data released Friday by music s...
items.description: BTS set a new industry benchmark with the group's latest album, "Arirang," selling approximately 4.17 million copies in its first week, according to data released Friday by music sales tracker Hanteo Chart. This surpasses the group's own previous record of 3.37 million copies held by its 2020 release "Map of the Soul: 7." "Arirang" achieved million-seller status within just 10 minutes of its launch and moved 3.98 million units on the first day alone, marking the highest single-day sales figure f

items.description: Cortis will bring out second EP “GreenGreen” on May 4 and drop the lead single in April, along with a supporting music video. The rookie boy group will upload a series of teaser content leading up to the album release, starting with a batch of photographs on April 6. The title of the main track is to be disclosed a week before the drop, accompanied by a music video teaser. items.title: BTS tops 115 Apple charts, selling 4.17m in 1 week
items.snippet: The fifth studio album from BTS, “Arirang,” sold 4.17 million copies in one week, a career-best for the septet, Big Hit Music said Friday, citing a local data firm. The album dropp...
items.description: The fifth studio album from BTS, “Arirang,” sold 4.17 million copies in one week, a career-best for the septet, Big Hit Music said Friday, citing a local data firm. The album dropped on March 20 and sold 3.98 million copies on the day of its release, easily surpassing the first-week sales of its previous LP, “Map of the Seoul: 7,” in 2020. It landed atop Apple Music albums charts in 102 regions and added 13 more by Friday, notching No. 1 spots on Oricon’s weekly, weekly combined and weekly digit

items.title: NCT’s Taeyong to roll out 1st solo LP: report
items.snippet: Taeyong of NCT is returning as a solo musician, according to a local media report Friday. He is gearing up to drop a digital single next month, followed by a studio album, his firs...
items.description: Taeyong of NCT is returning as a solo musician, according to a local media report Friday. He is gearing up to drop a digital single next month, followed by a studio album, his first, due out in May. The digital single, however, is not a prerelease from the upcoming set, as is practically the rule in the K-pop scene these days. Taeyong’s first solo endeavor was EP “Shalala” in June 2023. items.title: SHINee’s Taemin drops 1st English-language single
items.snippet: Taemin of SHINee is unveiling his first digital single in English on Friday, according to Galaxy Corp. “Long Way Home” comes ahead of his festival debut at the Coachella Valley Mus...
items.description: Taemin of SHINee is unveiling his first digital single in English on Friday, according to Galaxy Corp. “Long Way Home” comes ahead of his festival debut at the Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival in Indio, California, where he will hit the stage on April 11 and 18. He is set to become the first male K-pop solo artist to join the festival lineup.
